summary: District disruption may affect Liverpool Street: Part Closure. DISTRICT LINE: Saturday 6 and Sunday 7 June, no service between Turnham Green and Ealing Broadway. Replacement buses operate.

status.reason: DISTRICT LINE: Saturday 6 and Sunday 7 June, no service between Turnham Green and Ealing Broadway. Replacement buses operate.
